channel.title: hugo on My Blog - For Fun
channel.description: Recent content in hugo on My Blog - For Fun

item.title: How to Build Blog With Hugo on Github
item.description: Hugo on your MacOS Setting github create a repo named blogs for store hugo programes. Create another repo named echowings.github.io to host websit. generate ssh key and regist it on github settings. Install hugo brew install hugo Create a blog site. hugo new site blogs init git cd blogs git init #Add remote repo. git remote add origin git@github.com:echowings/blogs.git #Add a theme for your hugo. git submodule add -b master
